name: concurrent_requests_race_condition
description: Test if simultaneous requests to /store/inventory return consistent inventory counts or expose race conditions in data retrieval.
input_hint: Send 50+ concurrent GET requests and compare response values for consistency

name: missing_auth_token_endpoint_access
description: Test if endpoint enforces authentication when no Authorization header is provided, even though params list is empty.
input_hint: Send GET request without Authorization header and verify 401/403 response

name: extremely_large_response_payload
description: Test if client can handle very large inventory response payloads without timeout, memory overflow, or truncation.
input_hint: Verify response size limits and streaming behavior when inventory contains thousands of items

name: malformed_query_string_injection
description: Test if endpoint properly rejects or sanitizes malformed query parameters like null bytes, unicode, or SQL injection patterns.
input_hint: Append ?status=pending%00&filter=<script> and verify safe error handling

name: expired_auth_token_rejection
description: Test if endpoint rejects requests with expired or invalid JWT/bearer tokens with appropriate error codes.
input_hint: Send GET request with expired/revoked authentication token and verify 401 Unauthorized response

name: quantity_boundary_zero
description: Verify that quantity value of 0 is rejected since minimum is 1.

name: quantity_boundary_exceeded
description: Verify that quantity value exceeding maximum of 100 is rejected.

name: petid_negative_value
description: Verify that negative petId is rejected since minimum is 1.

name: status_invalid_enum
description: Verify that status values outside the allowed enum are rejected.

name: shipdate_invalid_format
description: Verify that shipDate with invalid date-time format is rejected.

name: order_id_below_minimum_boundary
description: Validates that orderId values below the minimum constraint of 1 are properly rejected with appropriate error.

name: order_id_above_maximum_boundary
description: Validates that orderId values exceeding the maximum constraint of 10 are properly rejected with appropriate error.

name: order_id_with_decimal_precision
description: Validates behavior when orderId is provided as a decimal number instead of integer.

name: order_id_as_string_numeric
description: Validates type coercion handling when orderId is sent as a string representation of a number.

name: concurrent_requests_same_order_id
description: Validates system behavior and data consistency when multiple simultaneous requests are made for the same orderId.
input_hint: Send 10+ concurrent GET requests with orderId=5 simultaneously

name: delete_order_with_zero_id
description: Verify API rejects orderId of 0, which violates the minimum constraint of 1.

name: delete_order_with_negative_id
description: Verify API rejects negative orderId values that violate the minimum boundary constraint.

name: delete_order_with_max_int64
description: Verify API handles the maximum int64 value without overflow or unexpected behavior.

name: delete_nonexistent_order_id
description: Verify API response when attempting to delete an orderId that was never created or already deleted.

name: concurrent_delete_same_order
description: Verify behavior when multiple simultaneous DELETE requests target the same orderId to detect race conditions.
input_hint: Send 5+ parallel requests with same orderId
